candidates.observed_problem: A live sibling declaration error again collapsed an otherwise clean Depot-owned release suite into one opaque nonzero result.
candidates.dedupe_reason: The same live sibling boundary recommendation is evidenced by two distinct Pipeline runs and no completed reporting split exists.
candidates.mechanical_work: Emit separate named Depot-owned release and live sibling compatibility results while preserving a nonzero combined result when either required lane fails.
candidates.judgment_boundary: Humans retain authority to decide whether a sibling compatibility failure blocks a particular release; the tool only separates evidence.
acceptance_tests: A Depot-owned failure is reported in the owned lane.
A malformed live sibling declaration is reported only in the sibling integration lane.
The combined release result remains nonzero when either required lane fails.
candidates.safety_boundary: Do not weaken or skip the live sibling compatibility check and do not mutate the sibling repository.
candidates.compatibility_notes: Preserve Claude and Codex validator entry points and current stable exit behavior.
candidates.benefit_rationale: Separate evidence shortens diagnosis while keeping both authority boundaries visible.

candidates.observed_problem: The terminal observer consumed all receipts but could not prove the prediction binding, and the gap was not diagnosed until closeout.
candidates.dedupe_reason: No completed startup self-check is referenced by the sealed observation evidence.
candidates.mechanical_work: After sealing prediction evidence, run a read-only binding verification and persist an exact failure category before the first authoritative action.
candidates.judgment_boundary: The self-check reports binding state only; Pipeline Markdown and human gates remain authoritative and no automatic rebind is permitted.
acceptance_tests: A valid pre-start binding reports usable before run.started.
A mismatched state directory fails before authoritative actions.
No command can repair or rebind prediction evidence after actions begin.
candidates.safety_boundary: Observation only; never advance workflow state, rewrite prediction evidence, or authorize merge or cleanup.
candidates.compatibility_notes: Preserve shadow-mode behavior and stable Claude/Codex command adapters.
candidates.benefit_rationale: Earlier binding diagnosis avoids terminal-only parity investigation without claiming token savings.

candidates.observed_problem: The provider privacy boundary had to prevent private workspace export for one OpenRouter-requested chunk.
candidates.dedupe_reason: The existing host guard stopped export and produced an explicit Codex fallback receipt, so no new upstream implementation is needed.
candidates.mechanical_work: No new work; retain the existing pre-export decline and explicit fallback contract.
candidates.judgment_boundary: Agents still classify whether a workspace export is safe; the host policy remains final.
acceptance_tests: Private content is declined before export.
The fallback receipt records requested, attempted, implemented-by, and reason.
candidates.safety_boundary: Never weaken the privacy guard to improve routing utilization.
candidates.compatibility_notes: Keep the same safe fallback semantics for Claude and Codex hosts.
candidates.benefit_rationale: The existing control behaved correctly and should be deduplicated as completed.

candidates.observed_problem: Final review found stale caller-authored verification authority and an unsafe caller-selected review exclusion.
candidates.dedupe_reason: Commits 7d8b712 and e6426df plus 109 focused tests complete the control in this branch.
candidates.mechanical_work: No new work; preserve live repository capture and checked EventStore boundary persistence.
candidates.judgment_boundary: Reviewers still interpret findings; code establishes repository and read-only facts.
acceptance_tests: Stale and different checkouts block before spawn.
Run-root displacement during provider observation fails before evidence persistence.
candidates.safety_boundary: Keep capture and comparison read-only and fail closed on identity uncertainty.
candidates.compatibility_notes: Stable launcher commands and release inventory cover both Claude and Codex runtimes.
candidates.benefit_rationale: The owned repair and hostile tests close both final-review findings.
